End-to-end data pipeline

Source records flow through Python ETL, normalized SQL modeling, quality checks, and cloud delivery to communicate the engineering workflow clearly.

Source Data
Python ETL
SQL Model
Streamlit
Data architecture

From source records to a cloud analytics application.

The project demonstrates the complete delivery path expected in entry-level data engineering and analytics engineering roles.

01 — INGEST

Source Data

SQL scripts and Python-generated records provide repeatable sales, customer, product, and order data.

02 — MODEL

3NF Database

Primary keys, foreign keys, indexes, and normalized tables enforce integrity and reduce redundancy.

03 — TRANSFORM

Analytics Layer

Reusable SQL views and pandas transformations calculate KPIs and reporting-ready datasets.

04 — SERVE

Cloud Delivery

Streamlit, GitHub Actions, and GitHub Pages provide a tested, public, recruiter-ready product.

Technology stack

Built with practical data engineering tools.

The public demo uses SQLite for portability while the repository includes SQL Server-oriented assets for relational database depth.
